description: Deploy the isolated sandbox/live payment reconciler, then install its reconciler-only claim RPC and versioned cron jobs. The legacy webhook remains in containment mode.
deploymentOrder: verify function secret INTERNAL_CRON_SECRET, existing Vault entry internal_cron_secret, and both URL Vault entries without printing values
smoke test unauthorized request returns 401 and does not access Stripe or the database
verify both cron jobs and service_role-only RPC grants
postMigrationVerification: SELECT jobname, schedule FROM cron.job WHERE jobname IN ('payments-reconcile-sandbox','payments-reconcile-live') ORDER BY jobname;
rollback: SELECT cron.unschedule(jobid) FROM cron.job WHERE jobname IN ('payments-reconcile-sandbox','payments-reconcile-live'); then redeploy/remove payments-reconcile. The reconciler-only RPC may remain inert or be removed by a reviewed corrective migration.
